title: Monday Forms inaccessible to non-users

posts.author: JaniceRoss (Janice Ross)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve used the ‘Share via link’ URL to allow visitors to our website to find the form from a hyperlink button. It worked yesterday but today I’m getting this message…

Please log in to fill this form

Authentication is required in order to submit this form

Already a member? Log in

Is this a glitch or do I need to do anything in the settings?
Please and thank you.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Janice,

If you’re admin, can you make sure this setting hasn’t been changed (or if you’re not, can you confirm this with your account admin)?

Screen Shot 2024-04-15 at 4.12.13 pm1620×1002 106 KB

We can go from there!
